description: [cp] - Copy files and directories. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.explanation: Executes the cp routine logically to process: copy source file to destination

commands.description: Recursively copy directories and their contents

Executes the cp routine logically to process: copy interactively (prompt before overwrite)

commands.description: Verbose output explaining what is being copied
commands.explanation: Executes the cp routine logically to process: verbose output explaining what is being copied
